creator: chris@smartt.com
text:
I noticed benchmarks/postal port wasn't up to date with the latest version. Patches for Makefile and distinfo follow.

Fix: PORTNAME=      postal
-PORTVERSION=   0.69
+PORTVERSION=   0.70
 CATEGORIES=    benchmarks mail
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.coker.com.au/postal/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=  .tgz
